updates.tweet_text:
We are +325 points from Wednesday's huge 7310 Failed Breakdown. As posted then, this was an institutional accumulation event. Target was 7590 in #ES_F. It then became support today, which held. 7611, 7620, 7639 were todays targets. 7660, 7689 bonus.

7620=micro support, then 7590 https://t.co/6DnNom2MVy
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7311,7590,7611,7639,7660) are morning-plan levels or hindsight refs; 7620 micro support is a reaffirmation/observation, not a newly named actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @tradivate There will definitely be a pullback of some sort. Its better for bulls if we can lose 7590 from here
updates.notes: Casual conversational reply; '7590' is not named with actionable language, just a directional observation about losing a level. No explicit entry/watch/trigger framing.

updates.tweet_text:
Today's final target was 7639 in #ES_F and holding so far. Nothing to do up here as there is no volatility - just ride runner. If you trade without volatility, you get chopped. 7620 remains micro support, 7590 below.

No real quality entries until sub 7590. 7660, 7689 next https://t.co/XpdmaqteHH
updates.notes: 7689 named as 'next' resistance target above — not in morning plan. 7639/7660/7590/7620 are all morning-plan reaffirmations.

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F. No volatility. Wait for a pullback. 7611, 7590 will be overnight supports and watch traps of 7590. Below there we can retrace more properly to fill the Sunday gap. Newsltter out soon with entries
updates.notes: 7611 and 7590 are morning-plan levels (7611 listed); 7590 is close to 7587 plan level. No new actionable levels named — observational closing commentary.

updates.tweet_text:
Volatility remains so low it is untradeable. We got long last Wednesday on 7311 Failed Breakdown. #ES_F went +330. 1st support down posted at 3:17PM ystd was 7611, & it held 6:20PM

Plan today: Ride runner until we get vol. 7639, 7650, 7672 next. 7611, 7590 (watch traps)=supports https://t.co/LIbyuZh9lH
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7639, 7650, 7672/7673, 7611, 7590) are already in the morning plan. References to 7311 FBD and +330 are historical trade management, not new levels.

updates.tweet_text: NOTE: ES is rolling over from June 2026 front month (ESM2026) to September front month contract (ESU2026).  These levels are now all September. June will expire Friday June 19th and stop trading completely but as the week goes on volume will transfer to September
updates.notes: Tweet is an administrative rollover notice (ESM2026→ESU2026) with no actionable price levels named.

updates.tweet_text: @PX99128070 I broke that one down very extensively in last Wednesday's newsletter. It was a 730PM trigger but I sent the setup  out at around 3:30PM. Setups always given in advance with me and in specific terms, never in hindsight
updates.notes: No prices mentioned at all; tweet is a conversational reply about past newsletter timing and methodology, not an actionable level.

updates.tweet_text: @tanay1210 Nothing to trade unfortunately. Have an alert set to open my platform when 7590 touches!
updates.notes: 7590 is already in the morning plan. Tweet is conversational/alert-setting, not naming a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text:
Untradable conditions. Do not trade until we get a clear burst of volatility (hard sell). #ES_F still drifting from last Wednesday's 730pm 7311 Failed Breakdown/institutional buy.

7611 was most recent support, held last eve. 7639, 7650, 7672 above. 7590 (watch traps) below 7611 https://t.co/0RSSOq7ccE
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7311, 7611, 7639, 7650, 7672, 7590) are either morning-plan levels, observations of prior action, or directional lists — no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @SunTrader777 Should be enough to get people talking on social media. Often top callers appearing in comments, people asking "what happened" etc. Usually 40-200 points elevator down
updates.notes: Conversational reply about social media sentiment and point ranges; no actionable price level named.

updates.tweet_text: @SunTrader777 For today I'd want to see 7590 at least
updates.notes: 7590 is already in the morning plan. This is a reaffirmation in reply to a user, not a new actionable level.

updates.tweet_text:
Minature volatility expansion now in #ES_F.. Upside continues from last Wednesday's 7311 Failed Breakdown long/institutional accumulation event. 7611 was support. Held last evening, now back again, but used up.

7590 below (watch traps of this zone), then 7570, 7545. https://t.co/NCSIgdhHJp
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7611, 7590, 7570, 7545) are in the morning plan. Tweet is observational/reaffirming existing levels, no new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text: @OnTheHooch @upandown007 The structure would be at 7611 (the 6:20PM low last evening)
updates.notes: 7611 is already in today's morning plan. Tweet is a conversational reply explaining structure context, not a new actionable level call.

updates.tweet_text:
Volatility still low as we now chop around 7611. This was support given at 3pm yesterday and it held at 6pm precisely. Now, its a used up zone. Extremely bullish if #ES_F can push through this.

Otherwise, 7590 below (huge level, watch traps here). 7620, 7628, 7639+ above now https://t.co/Tiy74OA2Q8
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7611, 7590, 7620, 7628, 7639) are either morning-plan levels or observations/directional lists without new actionable naming language.

updates.tweet_text:
Tons of slow chop in #ES_F (summer trading, holiday week + last Wednesday we had a massive institutional accumulation event on the 7310 Failed Breakdown). 7611 remains a magnet. 7620 1st up - just hit, and its a ceiling for hours.

7628, 7639, then 7660+. 7590 remains very key https://t.co/gkih3jOr4i
updates.notes: 7628 and 7660+ named as next upside targets in sequence ('7628, 7639, then 7660+'); 7628/7660 not in morning plan. 7639/7590/7611/7620 are morning-plan reaffirmations.

updates.tweet_text: @MizuTraderr Thats part of it but the technicals matter too. We had a huge Failed Breakdown last Wednesday after a volatile window and that brings volatility way down in general.
updates.notes: Reply tweet explaining market technicals/volatility context. No price levels named, no actionable entries or targets mentioned.
